user.title: Connect to TimescaleDB
user.description:
Enter the PostgreSQL connection URL for your TimescaleDB instance.

Format: `postgresql://user:password@host:5432/dbname`

Additional options (SSL, filtering, chunk intervals) are available after setup via **Configure**.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the database. Check the URL and make sure PostgreSQL is reachable.

abort.already_configured: Scribe is already configured. Use **Configure** to change settings.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Scribe instance is allowed.

data_description.record_states: Write every state change to TimescaleDB
data_description.record_events: Write Home Assistant events (automations, scripts…) to TimescaleDB
data_description.include_domains: Only record entities from these domains. Leave empty to include all.
data_description.exclude_domains: Never record entities from these domains
data_description.include_entities: Only record these specific entities. Leave empty to include all.
data_description.include_entity_globs: Only record entities matching these patterns (e.g. sensor.temp_*)
data_description.exclude_entity_globs: Never record entities matching these patterns
data_description.exclude_attributes: Drop these attribute keys before writing (saves space)
data_description.include_events: Only record these specific event types. Leave empty to record all events.

data_description.batch_size: Number of rows accumulated before a flush is triggered (default 500)
data_description.max_queue_size: Maximum pending writes before oldest are dropped (default 10000)
data_description.buffer_on_failure: Keep events in memory and retry when the database becomes available again

data_description.enable_stats_io: Expose real-time write counters, buffer size and write duration as sensors
data_description.enable_stats_chunk: Expose per-table chunk counts (total / compressed / uncompressed) as sensors
data_description.stats_chunk_interval: How often (in minutes) chunk stats are refreshed from the database
data_description.enable_stats_size: Expose per-table sizes and compression ratios as sensors
data_description.stats_size_interval: How often (in minutes) size stats are refreshed from the database

data_description.enable_table_areas: Keep a mirror of Home Assistant areas in TimescaleDB
data_description.enable_table_devices: Keep a mirror of Home Assistant devices in TimescaleDB
data_description.enable_table_entities: Keep a mirror of the entity registry in TimescaleDB
data_description.enable_table_integrations: Keep a mirror of config entries (integrations) in TimescaleDB
data_description.enable_table_users: Keep a mirror of Home Assistant users in TimescaleDB

data_description.chunk_time_interval: TimescaleDB chunk interval (e.g. '7 days'). Affects new chunks only.
data_description.compress_after: Compress chunks older than this interval (e.g. '7 days'). Requires TimescaleDB compression.
data_description.db_ssl: Require an SSL/TLS connection to PostgreSQL
data_description.ssl_root_cert: Path to the CA certificate file (e.g. /ssl/ca.crt)
data_description.ssl_cert_file: Path to the client certificate file for mTLS
data_description.ssl_key_file: Path to the client private key file for mTLS

error.must_record_something: At least one of 'Record state changes' or 'Record events' must be enabled.
